mechanics.excerpt: Melissa Auburn'$ latest publication; The Black Widow: In Memoriam, stayed on the interstellar top ten list for an incredible thirteen months Lyran production team also created tne Immortal Warrior series_ holovid action adventure show in which the main character shares half his screen time with incredible explosions, carries small tortune weapons, never runs out of ammunition and expends about eight Iives per episode The Capellan Confederation imports most of its high profile entertainment; rather than directly subsidizing what calls 'unproductive labor Popular imports include Immortal Warrior series (held Up as proof of natural Lyran aggression) and Three House Entertainment's theatrical and musical troupes Lately; the Chancellor has allowed Canopian pleasure circuses -traveling DropShips stuffed with casinos and other flashy entertainment into the Confederation, gesture to the Magistracy of Canopus and reward Capellan soldiers for their recent hardships_ The Confederation' largest entertain MMiniEMcela Doutt the crl Lyral Inauctry ESolnsivI, Sipne Wora: For mere tan 250-98158' hosted Ive_BattleMtoch combat for publc ?
